channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Gas canisters and packaging dumped on side of Road, 4th March
item.description:
In the evening, when it’s dark , people sit in their cars and take laughing gas and litter the road with the gas canisters and boxes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fencing needed, 4th March
item.description:
Good morning I was wondering if it's possible to get a fence put up along a walkway that is backed onto a block of flats in Compton place, Erith. The walkway is between Shermanbury road and queens road. I often see men peeing In the bushes, and there's a lot of rubbish, it's not a nice sight for me or my children. Would make me feel a bit safer as well as we have had people jump over the back. I have a pictures of the walkway if you need those. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Compton Place, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and glass on road, 4th March
item.description:
Rubbish and glass on road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blurton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole / damaged road in Bournebridge Lane, that need immediate attention; otherwise, drivers attempting to avoid them are swerving into the wrong lane, posing a risk to other road users specially on poor weather and driving conditions.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole / damaged road in Bournebridge Lane, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole / damaged road in Bournebridge Lane, that need immediate attention; otherwise, drivers attempting to avoid them are swerving into the wrong lane, posing a risk to other road users specially on poor weather and driving conditions.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead aninal in road, 4th March
item.description:
A particular hazard as its right in the road before a busy junction and may cause cars to collide avoiding it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on steps for weeks, 4th March
item.description:
This is an unlicensed HMO/ aparthotel and has left this on step now for several weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign consistently blocking pavement, 4th March
item.description:
Large sign outside shop constantly being put out onto the pavement/blocking it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219, Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish & Fly Tipping, 4th March
item.description:
General rubbish has been spread all over the street outside the block of flats at the end of Saunders Road for weeks - if a Fox rips open a rubbish bag, nobody thinks it might be their responsibility to clear it up! This has now added to with large cardboard boxes, polystyrene and a mattress.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 4th March
item.description:
MY elderly neighbour appears to have lost her bins so is putting rubbish on street - can you collect and help her with bins thabks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post at an angle, 4th March
item.description:
Lamp post has been hit by a car and now is at an angle - likely will impact visibility of the bollards from afar - make the sign harder to spot for drivers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 219, Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign hit by car and now at angle/unstable, 4th March
item.description:
Road sign at huge angle and bottom at risk of snapping/injury risk to pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 237, Gipsy Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on Bournebridge Lane entry from B175, 4th March
item.description:
This pothole has been here for some time. This road (Bournebridge Lane) has many potholes that need immediate attention; otherwise, drivers attempting to avoid them are swerving into the wrong lane, posing a risk to other road users specially on poor weather and driving conditions.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste left on corner of the curb needs cleaning, 4th March
item.description:
Dog poo left on corner of the pavement - needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniel Gardens, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, 4th March
item.description:
The tree extends significantly beyond the land boundary, causing construction work to be suspended.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Short phases, 4th March
item.description:
Traffic jumping lights in haste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barley Lane, Seven Kings, Greater London

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 4th March
item.description:
Sign on lamp post is out. No code on column Column needed to be coded

item.title: Long hole / gouge in road, 4th March
item.description:
Running down centre of road. Pls repair. Ta.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 287, Pickhurst Lane, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Pothole, 4th March
item.description:
